ddls:
CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "total_steps" INTEGER /* Total number of steps taken in the episode */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the episode */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the episode */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the environment in which the episode was conducted */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the agent involved in the episode */,
  "training_session_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the training session in which the episode was conducted */,
  "episode_status" TEXT /* Status of the episode (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode in which performance was recorded */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the agent whose performance is being tracked */,
  "reward" REAL /* Total reward received by the agent during the episode */,
  "step" INTEGER /* Step number in the episode for which the performance is logged */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the environment in which the performance was recorded */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the agent at the step */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the environment at the step */,
  "training_session_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the training session in which the performance was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_performance_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_performance_training_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_performance_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for training the agent */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the agent was created */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the environment in which the agent is trained */,
  "training_session_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the training session in which the agent is trained */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Last date the agent was updated */,
  "environment_version" TEXT /* Version of the environment used for training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the training session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the session */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the environment in which the session was conducted */,
  "environment_version" TEXT /* Version of the environment used */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., training, testing, validation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reward_metrics" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward metric entry */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "average_reward" REAL /* Average reward for the agent over the episodes */,
  "max_reward" REAL /* Maximum reward achieved by the agent */,
  "min_reward" REAL /* Minimum reward achieved by the agent */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the environment in which the metrics were recorded */,
  "training_session_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the training session in which the metrics were recorded */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the specific episode in which the metrics were recorded */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_metrics_training_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_metrics_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_metrics_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, download) */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the environment associated with the access */,
  "training_session_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the training session associated with the access */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the specific episode associated with the access */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_training_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES agent_performance ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
